description_long: This is a rustic wooden cabin with a weathered blue metal gable roof, featuring a prominent raised dormer and two metal chimneys. The front facade includes a covered porch supported by wooden posts, with a workbench, stacked firewood, and a red fuel canister visible beneath the overhang. The exterior walls are constructed from vertical wooden planks, giving the structure a traditional, hand-built appearance. The side and rear walls have small, square-paned windows, while the main entrance is a single wooden door with a sign above it. The cabin sits on a simple concrete or stone foundation, surrounded by a patch of bare ground or gravel. The overall impression is of a utilitarian, well-used outbuilding, suitable for rural or edge-of-urban environments.
description: A rustic wooden cabin with a blue metal gable roof, covered porch, and small square windows, exuding a traditional, hand-built charm.
description_view_0: Front view showing the covered porch, workbench, stacked firewood, and the main roof with a raised dormer and two chimneys.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the main entrance door, a sign above it, and the full height of the gable roof with the dormer and chimneys.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying two small square windows and the simple vertical plank wall, with the roof and dormer visible above.
description_view_3: Angled rear-side view showing the two small windows, the side of the porch, and the roof's overhang with both chimneys.
attribute_roof_type: gable roof with a raised central dormer and two metal chimneys, constructed from corrugated metal panels
attribute_window_arrangement: Two small, square-paned windows symmetrically placed on the rear wall; no windows visible on the front or main entrance side
attribute_door_placement: Single wooden door located on the side wall beneath the gable, adjacent to the porch area
